name: extract-then-classify-b_generic-qwen35-9b
description: First eval of the two-stage extract-then-classify strategy on Dev B with Qwen3.5-9B-OptiQ-4bit. Architectural test of whether forcing structured evidence categorization before classification breaks the optimism-bias reflex (61 occurrences in FEEDBACK as of 2026-05-30). Compare headline + per-tier vs baseline-b_generic-qwen35-9b (19/33=58% on the same dataset).
